---
name: implement-task
description: Develop and testing from requirements to implementation and testing of a web application.
argument-hint: A task to implement, e.g., "Implement a web application for managing tasks with user authentication and CRUD operations."
---


# Steps to implement
1. Read and analyze the requirements of the web application from <input-requirements>
2. Planning and work breakdown of the web application both coding and testing from existing web application and requirements and structure the work into smaller tasks
3. Write code for the web application based on the requirements and work breakdown from best practices and standards for web development, and write tests to ensure the code works as expected
4. Test the web application to ensure it meets the requirements and is free of bugs
5. If test fails, debug the code and fix the issues, then retest until all tests pass
6. Summarize the implementation and testing process in to `MEMORY.md` file for future reference and knowledge sharing
